title: Lockheed Martin Shares Fall After Q1 Revenue Miss
text: Lockheed Martin Corp (NYSE: LMT) reported a first-quarter FY22 net sales decline of 8% year-over-year to $14.96 billion, missing the consensus of $15.55 billion. EPS declined to $6.44 from $6.56 in 1Q21, beating the consensus of $6.21.

title: Lockheed Martin stock drops after profit beat expectations but sales falls short
text: Shares of Lockheed Martin Corp. LMT, -0.05% dropped 2.9% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the aerospace and defense contractor reported first-quarter profit that beat expectations but sales that fell well short, as all four of its business segments missed expectations. Net income fell to $1.73 billion, or $6.44 a share, from $1.84 billion, or $6.56 a share.

title: Lockheed quarterly profit falls 5.7% on supply chain snags
text: U.S. weapons maker Lockheed Martin Corp reported a 5.7% fall in quarterly profit on Tuesday, hurt by supply chain snags triggered by the COVID-19 pandemic.

title: Lockheed Martin Reports First Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: Net sales of $15.0 billion Net earnings of $1.7 billion, or $6.44 per share Cash from operations of $1.4 billion and free cash flow of $1.1 billion Returned $2.8 billion of cash to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends Reaffirms 2022 financial outlook BETHESDA, Md., April 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Lockheed Martin Corporation [NYSE: LMT] today reported first quarter 2022 net sales of $15.0 billion, compared to $16.3 billion in the first quarter of 2021.
